description: Missive is a collaborative email and team inbox platform for managing shared conversations, contacts, drafts, and workflows. It also includes AI features and integrations for external tools inside the Missive product.
summary: missiveapp.com exposes a documented REST API at https://public.missiveapp.com/v1 authenticated with a personal Bearer API token; no public GraphQL API, CLI, or Missive-hosted MCP server was found.
